title: ostrya knowltonii
intro: Ostrya knowltonii, also known as Knowlton's hophornbeam or Knowlton's ironwood, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Ostrya knowltonii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically made from the bark, leaves, or roots of the plant.
